pipely.title: Pipely
pipely.desc: An all-in-one Sales Management System that helps businesses manage point of sale, stock, and purchases.
pipely.overview: Pipely is an all-in-one Sales Management System built to simplify how businesses handle daily transactions, stock movement, and purchasing — all from a single connected platform.
pipely.challenge: Businesses needed a single system to manage sales, stock, and purchasing instead of juggling disconnected tools.
pipely.solution: Built an integrated sales management platform combining point of sale, stock and purchase tracking, and multi payment support in one interface.

stockflow.title: StockFlow
stockflow.desc: A Warehouse Management System that provides better visibility and control over inventory operations.
stockflow.overview: StockFlow gives warehouse teams better visibility and control over inventory operations, from check-in to stock opname, in one streamlined system.
stockflow.challenge: Warehouse operations needed clearer visibility over stock movement and a reliable way to reconcile inventory.
stockflow.solution: Developed a Warehouse Management System covering check-in/check-out flows and stock opname processes to keep inventory data accurate.

plannr.title: PlannR
plannr.desc: A Project Management System that helps teams organize projects and monitor performance on one platform.
plannr.overview: PlannR helps teams organize projects, manage clients, and monitor profit and loss performance from a single connected platform.
plannr.challenge: Teams needed a unified way to track tasks, manage client relationships, and monitor project profitability.
plannr.solution: Built a project management platform combining task tracking, client management, and profit & loss monitoring in one workspace.

kruu.title: Kruu
kruu.desc: A Human Resource Management System (HRMS) that simplifies employee administration and streamlines payroll.
kruu.overview: Kruu is a Human Resource Management System (HRMS) that simplifies employee administration, payroll, and leave management for growing teams.
kruu.challenge: HR teams needed to streamline employee administration, payroll processing, and leave management in one system.
kruu.solution: Developed an HRMS covering employee management, payroll processing, and leave management to simplify HR operations.

jipies.title: Jipies
jipies.desc: A Fleet Management GPS platform that provides real-time visibility into vehicle operations and driver behavior.
jipies.overview: Jipies is a Fleet Management GPS platform giving businesses real-time visibility into vehicle operations, geo-fencing, and driver behavior.
jipies.challenge: Field operations teams needed real-time visibility into vehicle location and driver behavior across their fleet.
jipies.solution: Built a GPS fleet management platform with real-time tracking, geo-fence alerts, and driver behavior monitoring.

classix.title: Classix
classix.desc: An integrated ERP platform for educational institutions that simplifies administration and learning management.
classix.overview: Classix is an integrated ERP platform for educational institutions, simplifying administration, attendance, and e-learning in one system.
classix.challenge: Educational institutions needed a single platform to manage administration, attendance, and digital learning.
classix.solution: Developed an education ERP combining smart administration, smart attendance, and smart e-learning modules.

diggit.title: Diggit
diggit.desc: A Mining ERP System that helps companies monitor production, logistics, and financial operations.
diggit.overview: Diggit is a Mining ERP System that helps companies monitor production, logistics, and financial operations from the field to the back office.
diggit.challenge: Mining operations needed better monitoring of stock, logistics, and field vehicle activity across remote sites.
diggit.solution: Built a mining ERP system covering stock & inventory management, geo-fence alerts, and driver behavior monitoring.

sailoo.title: Sailoo
sailoo.desc: A Voyage Management System built to optimize maritime operations, fleet scheduling, and supply chain.
sailoo.overview: Sailoo is a Voyage Management System built to optimize maritime operations, vessel scheduling, and port logistics.
sailoo.challenge: Maritime operators needed centralized visibility over voyage orders, vessel propulsion, and port operations.
sailoo.solution: Developed a voyage management system with voyage order management, vessel propulsion monitoring, and port management.

registr.title: RegistR.
registr.desc: An Event Management System (EMS) that helps organizers manage registrations, ticketing, and attendee experiences.
registr.overview: RegistR. is an Event Management System (EMS) that streamlines every touchpoint of an event, from registration to on-site check-in.
registr.challenge: Event organizers needed a centralized platform to manage ticketing, attendee check-in, and seating from one place.
registr.solution: Built an event management system with ticketing, self-service check-in, seat reservation, and ticket customization.

converra.title: Converra
converra.desc: A Smart Content Management System built to simplify screen management and content delivery at scale.
converra.overview: Converra is a Smart Content Management System (CMS) that enables businesses to distribute, schedule, and monitor content across multiple displays from one centralized platform.
converra.challenge: Businesses with multiple digital displays needed centralized control over device pairing, content scheduling, and screen health.
converra.solution: Developed a smart CMS with device pairing & screen management, screen status monitoring, and content upload tools.

interactive-gamifications.title: Interactive Gamifications
interactive-gamifications.desc: A suite of interactive games designed for events, exhibitions, and brand activations.
interactive-gamifications.overview: Interactive Gamifications is a suite of engaging mini-games — Shio, Spinwheel, PAP, Scream, Catch, Memory Card, Puzzle, and Whack a Mole — designed to turn interactions into memorable experiences at events, exhibitions, and brand activations.
interactive-gamifications.challenge: Brands needed engaging, easy-to-deploy interactive games to drive participation at events and exhibitions.
interactive-gamifications.solution: Built a suite of interactive web-based games covering spin, memory, reaction, and puzzle mechanics, ready to deploy on kiosks and booths.
